description_long: This lighthouse features a tall, tapered octagonal tower with alternating red and white horizontal stripes, capped by a red conical roof. The base is robust and dark-colored, providing a solid foundation, while a small attached rectangular annex with a red roof extends from one side. At the top, a lantern room is present, encircled by a gallery balcony with a protective railing. The entrance is marked by a small, gabled doorway at the base, adding architectural detail. The structure is visually simple yet iconic, evoking traditional coastal lighthouse designs with a functionalist style.
description: A tall, red-and-white striped lighthouse with a conical roof, lantern room, and gallery balcony, featuring a small annex and a gabled entrance.
description_view_0: The lighthouse is seen from an angle highlighting the striped tower, the red conical roof, and the attached rectangular annex on the right.
description_view_1: This view shows the front entrance with a small gabled roof, the full height of the striped tower, and the lantern room with balcony.
description_view_2: The lighthouse is viewed from the opposite side of the annex, showing the tower, roof, and the annex extending to the left.
description_view_3: A rear view of the lighthouse, focusing on the striped tower and lantern room, with the annex mostly hidden.
